name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing a few words?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We hope the visit felt easy and comfortable — that's always what we're going for.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a quick review. Honest feedback from patients is how other folks who are nervous about the dentist find us and decide to give us a try:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something didn't feel quite right during your visit, just hit reply — we'd much rather hear from you directly so we can make it right.

Thanks again, and take good care of those teeth.

— The team at Bright Smile Dental
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick follow-up: if you have a sec, a short review really helps folks find us. Thanks! https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
